status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 6 / BIOLOGIC OR MIXTURE IDENTITY BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Compositionally variable thymic peptide extract / mixture product family
mechanism_summary: No single-peptide mechanism is assigned; reported activity concerns a heterogeneous thymic extract with composition dependent on source and manufacturing.
evidence_maturity: Regional reports and preclinical literature exist, but analytical composition, independent replication and product comparability are insufficiently closed.
regulatory_headline: MIXTURE IDENTITY AND REGIONAL-STATUS UNCERTAINTY — NO UNIVERSAL APPROVAL CLAIM
closure_class: THYMUS-DERIVED POLYPEPTIDE EXTRACT / COMPOSITION AND SOURCE IDENTITY
closure_state: BLOCKED — SPECIES, TISSUE SOURCE, EXTRACTION PROCESS, PEPTIDE COMPOSITION, BATCH FINGERPRINT, STERILITY AND INDEPENDENT HUMAN EVIDENCE UNVERIFIED
authoritative_product_boundary: Published Thymalin literature concerns a thymic extract or polypeptide preparation, not one canonical peptide sequence. Older clinical reports and extract-characterisation papers do not establish the composition, manufacturer, quality or equivalence of TY10.
critical_closure_controls: Thymalin is not assigned one peptide sequence
Do not transfer thymosin alpha-1, thymosin beta-4 or Vilon evidence
Older regional clinical reports do not certify TY10
Biological-source and transmissible-agent controls remain mandatory
No immune, longevity, dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
